title: Gerascanthus rotatus

taxonomy: Gerascanthus rotatus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Ebenaceae. The Ebenaceae family is a small and ancient group of plants that are primarily found in tropical regions. The species Gerascanthus rotatus is native to Madagascar and is a part of this unique family. The plant is characterized by its distinctive features, such as its unique flower structure and leaf morphology. As a result, it has been placed in the Ebenaceae family within the order Oxalidales.
